typography.strategy: The Swiss Brutalist (Tech / Performance) - Radical weight contrast

scale.h1: text-4xl sm:text-5xl lg:text-6xl tracking-tighter leading-none font-black
scale.h2: text-2xl sm:text-3xl lg:text-4xl tracking-tight leading-tight font-bold

rules: No generic sans-serif for headings (Banned: Inter, Roboto).
Headlines MUST use tight letter spacing (tracking-tighter).
Overlines MUST be Uppercase + Tiny + Wide Spacing.
Never use text-7xl or above for heroes.
Use Deep Obsidian (#0A0A0A) as primary anchor.
Pair with Pure White for data clarity and Electric Blaze (#FF3B30) for kinetic triggers.
Replace soft shadows with 1px solid strokes or 2px 'Inner Glow' highlights.
Tinted Grey Rule: Never use pure #000000, always tint lightly with blue for obsidian feel.

spacing_and_layout.strategy: MODE B: The Control Room Grid (Density, Data Correlation, Scanability)
spacing_and_layout.surface_strategy: Grid Borders (Technical Look) - Expose the skeleton. Container uses border-collapse style layout. Items have border-r border-b border-border/40.
rules: Generous padding inside bordered containers to prevent text collision.
No rounded corners for a sharp, tactical feel. Max border-radius: rounded-sm (2px) for inner inputs only.
Every pixel utilized. Use h-full on children to stretch and match neighbors. No jagged bottoms.

headers_and_nav.style: Solid Background with a hard bottom border (border-b border-[#262626]). bg-[#0A0A0A].
headers_and_nav.rules: Navigation links MUST be visible on desktop. No transparent headers over hero sections without a blur.

buttons.primary: bg-[#FF3B30] text-white font-bold rounded-none hover:bg-[#D62F26] transition-colors
buttons.secondary: bg-transparent border border-[#3F3F3F] text-white hover:border-[#FF3B30] hover:text-[#FF3B30] rounded-none transition-all
buttons.rules: ONLY use primary brand color for CTAs like submit form, place stake, join game.

cards_and_widgets.style: Flat background (#141414), 1px subtle border (#262626), no shadow. Sharp corners (rounded-none).
cards_and_widgets.hover: Slight border highlight (border-[#3F3F3F]), NO y-axis movement for dense dashboard items.

forms_and_inputs.style: bg-[#0A0A0A] border border-[#262626] text-white focus:ring-1 focus:ring-[#FF3B30] focus:border-[#FF3B30] rounded-none

shadcn_customization: Use pure HTML+Tailwind for Marketing layout sections if any.
HEAVILY CUSTOMIZE Shadcn components for forms, dialogs, charts.
Override default Shadcn rounding to rounded-none.
Use Shadcn charts/Recharts for 'Game History' and 'Player Leaderboard' win rates.

interactions.hover_states: Always explicitly set text color on hover. Example: hover:bg-[#1A1A1A] hover:text-white.
interactions.focus_states: Focus states MUST have HIGHER contrast. focus:ring-2 focus:ring-[#FF3B30].
interactions.animations: Minimalist (Tactical). Use micro-interactions for feedback. Avoid bouncy/elastic animations. Use crisp ease-out transitions (150ms).

media_and_assets.icon_library: @phosphor-icons/react (Duotone or Regular weight for sharp dashboard clarity)

hero_background.description: Tactical command center interface in a dark room. Deep obsidian background with sharp red accent lines. Use with an overlay bg-black/40 if placing text on top.
hero_background.placement: Marketing landing page hero background or Tournament Lobby Header.

active_tournament_promo.description: Professional gamers competing in a team tournament.
active_tournament_promo.placement: Image for 'Featured Tournament' or 'Browse Active Games' empty state.

hardware_action.description: Close-up of glowing gaming controllers on a dark surface.
hardware_action.placement: Banner image for 'Join Game with Stake' or 'Wallet/Balance' deposit section.

instructions_to_main_agent: This app relies on 'Archetype 2: The Performance Pro'. Strictly enforce a 'Tactical Minimalism' look. Dark mode only.
DO NOT use generic Inter for headings. Use Chivo (or Bebas Neue).
Implement the 'Control Room' grid layout for the dashboard. Use border-collapse and exposed grid lines.
Data-testids MUST be added to all interactive elements for robust automated testing (e.g., data-testid='create-tournament-button').
Use strictly Shadcn for complex components (Dialogs, Dropdowns) but customize classes heavily to remove the default Vercel-look.
Do NOT use 'rounded-md' or soft shadows. Everything should be sharp (rounded-none or max rounded-sm) with 1px borders.
Display critical live KPIs at the top (Active matches, Live Players, Total Stakes) in the North Star metric pattern.
Do NOT use placeholder text for any images. Use the provided media_and_assets URLs.
